raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "ICE has routinely engaged in violent human rights abuses.",
    "Since its establishment almost 20 years ago, ICE has used billions of dollars in federal funding to achieve its sole purpose of inhumane detention and deportation.",
    "Deportations of Southeast Asians, particularly those with criminal convictions, grew at an alarming rate under the Trump administration.",
    "ICE has consistently demonstrated an inability to fulfill its duties without violating due process, human rights, transparency, public accountability, or an adherence to domestic and international law.",
    "The agency continues to target those who escaped political persecution and genocide to come to the United States in search of freedom and opportunity.",
    "The Biden administration's immigration enforcement memo continues to allow ICE to detain immigrants with aggravated felony convictions.",
    "To date, more than 2,000 Southeast Asian Americans have been deported from the United States.",
    "Hundreds of Southeast Asian refugees, like An Thanh Nguyen, still face deportation after having served their prison sentences.",
    "The Biden administration’s most recent ICE enforcement memo puts immigrants and refugees with criminal convictions at greater risk of deportation.",
    "A pardon from Governor Newsom is seen as the only way to prevent deportation and further harassment by ICE for many refugees."
  ]
}
```
